whatWasImplemented: src/lib/chat/rate-limit.ts — rewritten. Three named async limiters: checkChatRateLimit (1 req / 3s per key), checkCrawlRateLimit (5 / hr per user), checkFileUploadRateLimit (60 / hr per user). Backed by @upstash/ratelimit sliding-window when UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL + UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN are set; falls back to a process-local Map when not (dev + CI). checkRateLimit kept as async alias of checkChatRateLimit for existing callers. _resetRateLimit clears memory + caches for tests.
src/app/api/chat/session/route.ts — awaits checkRateLimit. Widget 429 already carried Retry-After, unchanged.
src/app/api/leads/route.ts — awaits checkRateLimit and now includes Retry-After on 429.
src/app/api/crawl/start/route.ts — new pre-auth rate-limit step using checkCrawlRateLimit(user.id); 429 + Retry-After on throttle.
src/app/api/files/route.ts — new pre-upload rate-limit step using checkFileUploadRateLimit(user.id); 429 + Retry-After on throttle.

src/__tests__/rate-limit-upstash.test.ts — 14 tests covering chat (1/3s), crawl (5/hr), files (60/hr), key isolation, window rollover, back-compat alias, and fallback state persistence within a process.
src/__tests__/rate-limit.test.ts — migrated to await the now-async checkRateLimit.
src/__tests__/crawl-start.test.ts + src/__tests__/file-upload.test.ts + src/__tests__/subscription-gate-routes.test.ts — extended vi.mock('@/lib/chat/rate-limit') to cover all named exports.
src/__tests__/escalation-runtime.test.ts — incidental classifier type-cast tightened from the M7 seal pass.
whatWasLeftUndone: Production Upstash credentials need to be set in Vercel env (UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL + UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN). Until then, prod runs on the in-memory fallback — same behavior as the pre-M8F1 limiter. Brandon to add the env vars before launch.

No end-to-end test proves limit persistence across a real serverless cold-start — that would need the Vercel preview environment. VAL-HARD-001's Upstash code path is exercised in the module boundary; the fallback path gives process-local guarantees that cover tests.
discoveredIssues: Existing callers (chat/session, leads) expected a sync checkRateLimit. Converting to async works because plain-value mocks (vi.fn(() => ({allowed:true}))) also satisfy await — but the vi.mock factories for three test files still had to be widened to list all new named exports so they don't blow up when the route imports checkCrawlRateLimit / checkFileUploadRateLimit.
ioredis was dead code. Removing shrinks node_modules and eliminates a noisy transitive dep tree (peer of Redis pubsub, etc.).

verification.testsRun: pnpm vitest run — 568 passing / 1 skipped / 68 files (+13 new: 14 upstash-rate-limit tests net after dropping 1 redundant).

manualChecks.action: checkCrawlRateLimit('u') called 6 times in the same fake-timers window
Fallback state persistence — two sequential chat-rate checks on same key across module re-imports

filesChanged: src/__tests__/escalation-runtime.test.ts (tightened type cast from M7 seal)
